MV MARINA R open CHINA PPT
To: charterer desk
PLS PPS FOR
MV  MARINA R   DWT 37K OPEN ZHOUSHAN, CHINA, 5TH-10TH JAN 2026;
BOD ABT 300MT LSFO, ABT 96MT MGO;
CAN TRY PERIOD AS WELL.
MV MARINA R
=============
DWAT 37,785 ON 10.42 SSW
SD / AUSTRALIAN FITTED / CO2 / MECHANICAL VENTILATION,
SELF TRIMMING GRAIN FITTED BULK CARRIER, MARSHALL FLAG,
CLASS LRS + 100 A1 BUILT 2010 / DOUBLE HULL / ICE CLASS B / UMS HOLDS / HATCHES - 5/5
MAKER AND TYPE OF THE HATCH COVERS - TTS FOLDING TYPE (2 PANELS FWD/2 PANELS AFT./EXTERNAL HYDRAULIK CYLDRS) M3 HATCH SIZES: 1: 16X16M - 2,3 AND 4: 22.4X18M - 5: 21.8X18M GRAIN/BALE 48957/47872
4X45 TON CRANES , MAX. WORKING RADIUS 44M.
WORK WITH 2 CRANES SIMULTANEOUSLY IN TANDEM WITH OR WITHOUT SPREADER 60 MT TO BE PREAPROVED BY OWRS
MAIN DECK 0.867 t/M2 ,HATCH COVER 2.5 t/M2
TANK TOP 20 MT/SQM IN ALL HOLDS FOR UNIFORM LOADING,
STRENGTHENED FOR HEAVY CARGOES
LOA/BEAM 189.99M/28.5M GRT/NRT 24099 / 12181
SPEED/CONSUMPTIONS IN GOOD WEATHER DAYS (GOOD WEATHER MEANS CONTINUOUSLY 24
HOURSFROM NOON TO NOON) UPTO BF4 AND DSS 3(MEANS SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT LESS THAN
1.25M) AND NO ADVERSE CURRENT, AND NO NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL, NO EXTRAPOLATIONS TO BE MADE FOR WEATHER/SEA CONDITIONS OTHER THAN THOSE DESCRIBED ABOVE,EXCLUDING
BALLASTING/DE BALLASTING /MANEUVERING OPERATIONS/COSTAL NAVAGITION.THE
UNDERPERFORMANCE (TIME LOST AND/OR OVER CONSUMPTION) CALCULATIONS ONLY APPLIED TO
GOOD WEATHER NOT TO BE APPLIED OVER THE ENTIRE VOYAGE,VSL HAS LIBERTY TO BURN MDO WHEN MANOEUVRING IN CANLS,RIVERS,CHANNELS,SHALLOW/NARROW/RESTRICTED WATERS,WHEN
STARTING ENGINE AND MANOEUVRING IN BAD WEATHER ,IN/OUT PORT FOR ECONOMIC REASONS
CHARTERERS HAVE THE OPTION TO ORDER THE VESSEL TO PROCEED AT INCREASED OR REDUCED
SPEED AT ANY TIME AND FOR ANY PERIOD OF TIME DURING THIS CHARTER PARTY. IF MASTER/CHIEF
ENGINEERS FIND SUCH SPEED ADJUSTMENT WILL DAMAGE THE M/E, THE MASTER/CHIEF ENGINEER
HAVE THEIR OWN DECISION TO RESUME SAILING AT CP SPEED/CONSUMPTION AT ANY TIME DURING THE PERIOD OF THIS C/P.
AT SEA:
LADEN: ABT 13.00 KNTS ON ABT 26 MT VLSFO (380 CST) PLUS ABT 0,2 MT LSMGO(DMZ) BALLAST: ABT 13.50 KNTS ON ABT 26 MT VLSFO (380 CST) PLUS ABT 0,2 MT LSMGO(DMZ) ECO SPEED/CONSUMPTION
ECO: LADEN: ABT 11,5 KNTS ON ABT 17.00 MT VLSFO (380 CST) PLUS ABT 0,2 MT LSMGO (DMZ) BALLAST: ABT 12 KNTS ON ABT 17.00 MT VLSFO (380 CST) PLUS ABT 0,2 MT LSMGO (DMZ)
ECO SPEED/CONSUMPTION INFO PROVIDED IS ABT WOG
IN PORT ALL INCLUSIVE:
WHEN IDLE ABT 3 MT VLSFO + ABT 0.2MTNS LSMGO (3.2 MTNS LSMGO (DMZ) WITH MIN. VISCOSITY 3CST WHERE SECA RULES/OTHER ENVORONMENTAL RESTRICTIONS APPLY).
WORKING: ABT 5 MT VLSFO + ABT 0.2MTNS LSMGO (5.2 MTNS LSMGO (DMZ) WITH MIN VISCOSITY 3CST WHERE SECA RULES/OTHER ENVIRONMENTAL RESTRICTIONS APPLY).
SPEED "ABOUT" DEFINED AS 0,5 KNOTS AND BUNKERS "ABOUT" 5% ALLOWANCE.
ALWAYS EXCL CANALS, NARROW/RESTRICTED WATERS AND DUE TO REASONS OF SAFETY OR POOR VISIBILITY, ETC. / AND FOR PERIODS WHEN SPEED IS REDUCED OR INCREASED DUE TO CHARTERERS\' ORDERS.
BUNKER SPEC: 2020 SPECS WITH ISO/PAS 23263:2019 FOR VLSFO / DMZ FOR LSMGO. ALL DETAILS AND FIGURES ARE \'ABOUT\' AND ARE GIVEN IN GOOD FAITH
